name: YTO Express Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: YTO Express Group Co.,Ltd. provides express delivery and logistics services in China and internationally. The company offers warehousing, distribution, and special transportation services. It also provides regional same-day, nationwide next-morning, nationwide next-day, and international small parcel delivery services; and pay on delivery, nominated pick-up and delivery, and cash on delivery services. YTO Express Group Co.,Ltd. operates through 352 mainline trucks and 1,500 sub-line trucks, as well as approximately 20,000 delivery vehicles; and 76 airports. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Shanghai, China.
